exam_context.goal: Prioriter ikke-narrative tekster efter hvor meget de styrker mundtlig sammenligning med narrativ psykologi.

method.academic_score: source_weight + band bonus + theory/term relevance + distinction support + course synthesis + lecture-context signals
method.visible_order: The visible plan is ordered by academic priority and relative study phase.
